lesson: A MIX LOW alarm with full stock and a float stuck in the raised position means the switch is lying about the level. Replace the float switch.
symptoms: MIX LOW alarm even with a full concentrate bag.
Bowl looks low but stock is definitely there.

tests.error-log: MIX LOW alarm repeating despite restocks.
tests.inspect-beater: Float switch is stuck in the raised position — telling the machine the bowl is full when it isn't.

flavour: Technically, the machine was an optimist.
authenticityNote: Float switches on slushie mix reservoirs can stick in the raised position due to syrup residue, falsely reporting 'full' and cutting feed to the bowl.
